message:
test(disk_pressure): add 30 property-based tests for disk pressure module

Tests DiskPressureTier ordering/serde, PressureThresholds normalization,
EwmaEstimator convergence bounds, PidController anti-windup invariants,
classify_tier monotonicity, and DiskPressureMonitor state machine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
